title: HiSET/TASC-aligned practice (additional HSE exams)
context: HiSET/TASC-aligned practice extends the HSE lane to additional brands. It may only start after the HSE IP/legal review is extended to these brands - the same trademark/non-affiliation posture and public-standard sourcing apply. Reviewer and brand-specific legal clearance are TO BE SECURED.
objective: Draft original HiSET/TASC-aligned practice items cited to public standards, only after the IP/legal review is extended to these brands.
acceptanceCriteria: Original items aligned to approved public standards; each cited; 100% citation coverage; validator passes
Carries nominative-trademark-use-only and non-affiliation disclaimers for HiSET/TASC; non-official/non-advice labels present
Does not begin until the HSE IP/legal review is extended to HiSET/TASC (recorded in governance)
